caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits Martinique
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing 14 kt winds and 3.1 ft wave heights with a 100% rain probability, while nearby St. Lucia has winds of 0 kt. I expect the strong winds and high rain probability to impact port operations in Martinique, with the dominant swell direction coming from the SE at a swell period of 6 s.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 24 kt winds with 4.2 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Lisbon has relatively calm conditions with 10 kt winds. I expect these winds to persist throughout the day, with the dominant swell direction remaining SSE, affecting maritime activities in the Western Mediterranean, particularly in ports like Cadiz.
